recommendations.title: A Quiet Place
recommendations.description: A family is forced to live in near silence while hiding from creatures that hunt by sound. A masterful exercise in tension and suspense with exceptional performances.…
recommendations.explanation: Recommended because both movies moderately share horror, post-apocalyptic, survival, thriller themes and elements.

recommendations.title: Mad Max Fury Road
recommendations.description: In a post-apocalyptic wasteland a woman rebels against a tyrannical ruler in search for her homeland with the aid of a group of female prisoners a psychotic worshiper and a drifter named Max.…
recommendations.explanation: Recommended because both movies moderately share post-apocalyptic, survival themes and elements.

recommendations.title: The Sixth Sense
recommendations.description: A child psychologist discovers that his new patient a young boy is communicating with dead people. M. Night Shyamalans masterwork with one of the most iconic twists in cinema history.…
recommendations.explanation: Recommended because both movies moderately share horror, thriller themes and elements.
